name: Complexul Energetic Oltenia
message: www.ceoltenia.ro https://www.ceoltenia.ro/en/despre/profil/date-financiare/ https://www.zoominfo.com/c/complexul-energetic-oltenia-sa/372669392 Complexul Energetic Oltenia is a Romanian energy company established on May 31, 2012, following the government's decision to reorganize the energy sector through the merger of several energy-producing companies. The company focuses on sustainable energy production and aims to ensure safety and professionalism in its operations. Its services include energy supply and commercialization, as well as investments in energy efficiency and development. The intended clients are diverse, including both residential and commercial sectors seeking reliable energy solutions.
